approval_phrase_template: I AUTHORIZE ONE PROSPECTIVE EXECUTION OF LCI-CAUSAL-TURNOVER-PRESEAL-03E FINAL_SEAL_SHA256=<FINAL_SEAL_SHA256>
invalid_reasons: This repair (03E) does NOT create FINAL_SEAL_MANIFEST_03E.json; a fresh independent sealing+audit agent must.
No final-seal Git blob or SHA-256 exists yet, so no valid approval can bind one.

note: Binding is to the FINAL_SEAL sha256 AND the execution-manifest blob AND the frozen approval phrase; a one-use authorization is consumed by the hash-chained execution ledger (turnover_execution_ledger.py).
